description: Mixin for serializers to add user access control fields

description.description: Short description of what the metric measures.

name.description: Name of the shared metric. Must be unique within the project (case-insensitive).

query.description: ExperimentMetric JSON. Must have kind='ExperimentMetric' and a metric_type: 'mean' (set source to an EventsNode with an event name), 'funnel' (set series to an array of EventsNode steps), 'ratio' (set numerator and denominator EventsNode entries), or 'retention' (set start_event and completion_event). Legacy kinds (ExperimentTrendsQuery, ExperimentFunnelsQuery) are rejected for new shared metrics.
